name: @sextant/sdk
description: The TypeScript Wire client for Sextant — a co-equal SDK peer to the Go SDK (ADR-0041), anchored on protocol epoch 1.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/test/codec.test.js dist/test/conformance.test.js dist/test/browser.test.js dist/test/integration.test.js
scripts.test:conformance: npm run build && node --test dist/test/codec.test.js dist/test/conformance.test.js dist/test/browser.test.js
